name: Group minting edge ordering validation
description: Tests group minting with Circles Backers group (0x1aca75e38263c79d9d4f10df0635cc6fcfe6f026). Source (1M CRC) and sink (18K CRC) both trust the group. Path goes Source → Router → Group (mint) → Sink. Validates edge ordering: Router→Group edges must precede Group→Avatar edges.
fixedIn: Fixture updated with verified group-connected addresses
